title: Anthropic Has the Template for Fixing Its Mythos Nightmare
description: Dario Amodei arrived at the G7 summit this week with a problem few tech bosses have faced: The US government had just treated his newest artificial-intelligence models as too dangerous to export. The Anthropic chief executive officer, long admired for warning Washington about AI’s worst risks, suddenly found those warnings turned back on him.

title: Apple CEO says AI boom makes price increases 'unavoidable'
description: Outgoing Apple CEO Tim Cook warned that demand for memory chips from the artificial intelligence boom will force the tech giant to increase the prices of its products, according to an interview with the Wall Street Journal published on June 17.

title: In Depth: How AI Is Rewiring White
